data.page_content:
Welcome to the Divoom API

    
##### command description
Only the display content of the 'Text' control can be updated

##### Request URL
- ` http://IP:9000/divoom_api `
  
##### Request method
- GET 

##### para

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:----    |:----- |-----   |
|Command |string |Device/UpdateDisplayItems  |
|DispList |Array | list     |
|->ID |number | Display element ID.It must be the ID of "Text"     |
|->TextMessage |string | display content when type is "Text".     |


##### Request example 
{
    "Command":"Device/UpdateDisplayItems",
	"DispList": [
		{
			"ID": 13,
			"TextMessage": "hello world!"
		}
	]
}

##### respone example 

``` 
  {
    "ReturnCode": 0
  }
```

##### Return value 

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|ReturnCode |number   |0  |
